chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D-1331 of 2025 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) Priority 1. For orders on CMA No.4573/2026 (Urgent Application) 2. For hearing of main case 27.02.2026 Mr. Sadruddin Burioro, Advocate for the petitioners Mr. Muhammad Kamran Baloch, AAG ---------------------- 1. Per office note, instant petition is fixed on 08.04.2026, however, learned counsel for the petitioner pleads urgency on the ground that he seeks disposal of this petition in view of the order dated 04.02.2026 passed by this Court vide C.P No.D-181 of 2026. In support of his contentions, he placed on record copy of the said order under cover of statement dated 27.02.2026, taken on record. Counsel therefore requests that by granting urgency, this petition may be heard today. Learned AAG present in Court in other matters, waives notice and extends his no objection. Order accordingly. 2. After arguing the matter at some length, learned counsel for the petitioner places reliance upon an un-reported order dated 17.02.2024 passed by a learned Division Bench of this Court in C.P. No. D-7787 of 2022 and seeks disposal of instant petition in the same terms. Before parting with the order, it will be appropriate to reproduce the crux of the said order, which reads as under: "It appears that this petition is on the same footings as that of CP. No. D-3974 of 2023, which was dismissed by Division Bench of this Court in limine by virtue of order dated 22.08.2023. This petition being on same footings is also dismissed. Accordingly, instant petition is dismissed alongwith pending application(s), if any.
This petition being on same footings is also dismissed. Accordingly, instant petition is dismissed alongwith pending application(s), if any. JUDGE HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE B-K Soomro
